query_string: SELECT * FROM auth_service.users WHERE id = ?
SELECT id, email, active, lastname, firstname FROM auth_service.users WHERE id = ?
SELECT * FROM auth_service.clients WHERE id = ?
INSERT INTO auth_service.audit_log (bucket, created_at, client_id, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO auth_service.contacts (id, name, email, phone, country) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE auth_service.customer SET active = ?, name = ? WHERE id = ?
INSERT INTO auth_service.access_data (code, payload) VALUES (?, ?) USING TTL 600
INSERT INTO auth_service.refresh_data (refresh_token, access_token) VALUES (?, ?) USING TTL 2592000
INSERT INTO auth_service.auth_data (code, payload) VALUES (?, ?) USING TTL 60
INSERT INTO auth_service.reset_password (code, email) VALUES (?, ?) USING TTL 1800
UPDATE auth_service.login_unsuccessful_attempts USING TTL 3600 SET unsuccessful_attempts = ? WHERE email = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth_service.audit_log WHERE bucket = ? AND created_at >= ?
SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM auth_service.audit_log WHERE bucket = ?
SELECT MIN(version), MAX(version) FROM auth_service.schema_version WHERE type = ?
SELECT SUM(unsuccessful_attempts) FROM auth_service.login_unsuccessful_attempts
SELECT AVG(execution_time) FROM auth_service.schema_update_version WHERE script_name = ?

BEGIN UNLOGGED BATCH INSERT INTO auth_service.auth_data (code, payload) VALUES (?, ?) IF NOT EXISTS; INSERT INTO auth_service.audit_log (bucket, created_at, client_id, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?); APPLY BATCH

BEGIN UNLOGGED BATCH UPDATE auth_service.users SET password = ?, password_validity = ? WHERE id = ? IF password = ?; INSERT INTO auth_service.audit_log (bucket, created_at, client_id, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?); APPLY BATCH
INSERT INTO auth_service.users (id, email, active, created) VALUES (?, ?, true, ?) IF NOT EXISTS
UPDATE auth_service.customer SET active = ? WHERE id = ? IF EXISTS
BEGIN BATCH INSERT INTO auth_service.clients (id, redirect_uri, secret) VALUES (?, ?, ?) IF NOT EXISTS; APPLY BATCH

BEGIN UNLOGGED BATCH INSERT INTO auth_service.audit_log (bucket, created_at, client_id, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?); INSERT INTO auth_service.audit_log (bucket, created_at, client_id, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?); APPLY BATCH
SELECT * FROM tpd_primary.message WHERE id = ?
SELECT * FROM tpd_primary.message_tracking WHERE id = ? AND time >= ? AND time <= ?
SELECT * FROM "Portal".replies WHERE type = ? AND systemid = ? AND mkey = ? AND mkey_extension = ?
SELECT * FROM reaper_db.repair_run WHERE id = ?
